overall.description: First-person exploration through a dark, gritty industrial warehouse complex in a video game. The player ascends metal stairs and navigates through narrow corridors with graffiti-covered walls and industrial barrels, transitioning into a larger warehouse space illuminated by red emergency lighting.

events.description: finishes ascending stairs and turns right into horizontal corridor

agents.ego_description: climbing metal stairs and proceeding through a narrow industrial corridor lined with graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: steep metal stairs with diamond plate treads leading upward
weathered concrete wall covered in black and white graffiti tags
stacked red metal barrels with silver rims
painted yellow metal handrail along the stairs and corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person ascent up a metal staircase in a dimly lit industrial facility. The player turns into a narrow corridor with graffiti-covered concrete walls, yellow safety railings, and red industrial barrels stacked along the path.

events.description: blue glowing loot canister becomes visible on the floor ahead
red emergency lighting becomes visible at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the corridor past industrial containers toward the red-lit warehouse entrance

entered.detail: small cylindrical container emitting bright cyan light, likely a lootable game item
large blue and gray metal storage containers and crates
intense red emergency light illuminating the distant doorway

segments.scene_description: Moving through the industrial corridor, a blue glowing canister appears on the metal floor. The corridor opens ahead into a space bathed in red emergency light, with industrial containers lining the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: large industrial warehouse bay with red emergency lighting

events.description: exits narrow corridor into expansive industrial warehouse space

agents.ego_description: walking through the expansive warehouse with red emergency lighting, approaching a distant doorway

entered.detail: high ceiling with exposed pipes, ducts, and industrial infrastructure
elevated metal walkway with railings spanning the warehouse
large industrial equipment and machinery with pipes and tanks
large industrial doorway with metal framing leading to another area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast industrial warehouse bathed in red emergency lighting. Metal catwalks span overhead, and large machinery clusters line the walls. The player moves across the metal grating floor toward a distant industrial doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dim, claustrophobic industrial corridor into a vast warehouse illuminated by red emergency lighting. It begins with an ascent up a metal staircase, turning into a narrow passage defined by graffiti-covered concrete walls, yellow safety railings, and stacked red barrels. As the camera moves forward, a blue glowing canister appears on the metal floor just before the corridor opens into a space bathed in a deep red glow. The scene then expands into a massive industrial warehouse where metal catwalks span overhead and large machinery clusters line the walls. Finally, the camera glides across the metal grating floor, heading toward a distant industrial doorway.
